calendar.matters:
MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-21-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to all Counsel as to why this matter should not be dismissed per CCP Section 583.360 for failure to comply with CCP Section 583.310 is heard this day. There being no appearance nor an objection filed. Court ordered case Dismissed pursuant to CCP Sections 583.360 and 583.310. Proceedings reported by: Patricia J. VanSteenberge, CSR#1742. (212)
